data.name: LabelControl1.Text
data.value: Check The Listed Cheques If They Were Cashed

data.name: lblDueChqListHint.Text
data.value: Lists cheques whose "Adjusted due date" equals today — that value is cheque due date + N working days (Sunday through Thursday; Friday and Saturday are skipped). This is not the same as "due within the next N days." Change N above, then click List Cheques.

data.name: lblChqDetailsVal.Text
data.value: Select a row above to see details.

data.name: lblChqDetailsCap.Text
data.value: PayID, Chq No., Account No., Bank, Owner, Due Date, Value, Pay Date, Notes, Cashed
